title: Pinterest’s stock is rising. Here’s why investors are cheering a big boost to the buyback program.
author: Hannah Pedone
fullText: Pinterest’s new share-repurchase authorization represents nearly a third of the company’s market cap and signals to one analyst that an activist is satisfied with the company’s strategic vision.
summary: Pinterest’s new share-repurchase authorization represents nearly a third of the company’s market cap and signals to one analyst that an activist is satisfied with the company’s strategic vision.
